start: ^, thanks for getting here on short notice.
^Agent 0x99: We have a situation developing at Viral Dynamics Media.
urgency_explanation: ^Agent 0x99: ENTROPY's Social Fabric cell is operating inside Viral Dynamics right now.
^Agent 0x99: They're running disinformation campaigns targeting the upcoming election.
briefing_threat: ^Agent 0x99: Social Fabric specializes in information manipulation—narrative control, social engineering at scale.
^Agent 0x99: They've infiltrated Viral Dynamics as employees. We don't know how many operatives, but we've identified at least one.
operative_identity: ^Agent 0x99: Derek Lawson. Senior Marketing Manager at Viral Dynamics.
^Agent 0x99: Perfect cover—his job is literally manipulating narratives for clients.
infiltration_timeline: ^Agent 0x99: Three months. Long enough to install backdoors, build trust, map the organization.
^Agent 0x99: He's not just stealing data—he's weaponizing the company's media distribution network.
entropy_objectives: ^Agent 0x99: They're collecting demographic data, testing disinformation tactics, mapping influence networks.
^Agent 0x99: It's all feeding into something bigger—Phase 3, though we don't know details yet.
phase_3_explanation: ^Agent 0x99: That's what we're trying to figure out. Multiple cells collecting different types of data.
^Agent 0x99: Social Fabric handles narrative manipulation. Other cells focus on infrastructure, finance, healthcare.
^So this is part of something larger
larger_threat: ^Agent 0x99: Exactly. But right now, we stop this cell. One operation at a time.
stakes_explanation: ^Agent 0x99: If they succeed, they'll manipulate election coverage across social media and news outlets.
^Agent 0x99: Viral Dynamics has distribution deals with dozens of platforms. Derek controls what millions see.
mission_objectives: ^Agent 0x99: One—Identify all ENTROPY operatives inside Viral Dynamics.
^Agent 0x99: Two—Gather evidence of the disinformation operation.
^Agent 0x99: Three—Intercept their communications with other cells.
cover_story: ^Agent 0x99: You're going in as an IT contractor hired to audit their network security.
^Agent 0x99: Completely legitimate. Viral Dynamics actually requested the audit weeks ago.
^So I'll have access to technical systems
technical_access: ^Agent 0x99: Server room, computers, network infrastructure—all fair game under your cover.
^Agent 0x99: Just stay professional. IT contractors ask questions; that's expected.
employee_interaction: ^Agent 0x99: IT contractors interact with everyone. Use it.
^Agent 0x99: People trust IT. They'll share passwords, complain about systems, gossip about coworkers.
resources_available: ^Agent 0x99: You'll have phone comms with me throughout. I'll provide guidance as needed.
^Agent 0x99: There's a SAFETYNET drop-site terminal in their server room for submitting intercepted intelligence.
tools_discussion: ^Agent 0x99: Your contractor kit has lockpicks, RFID cloner, and analysis tools.
^Agent 0x99: Everything you need looks like standard IT equipment. Stay in character.
approach_discussion: ^Agent 0x99: How do you want to handle this?

c-0: ^You: I'll take my time. Thorough beats fast.
c-1: ^You: I'll move quickly and get results.
^Agent 0x99: Good. Just don't rush past important evidence.
c-2: ^You: I'll adapt based on what I find.

final_instructions: ^Agent 0x99: Remember—Derek doesn't know we're onto him yet. Keep it that way.

b: ^Agent 0x99: Your careful approach should keep you under the radar. Document everything.
^Agent 0x99: Speed is good, but stealth is better. Stay professional.
^Agent 0x99: Read the room. If something feels off, trust that feeling.

specific_advice: ^Agent 0x99: The IT manager—Kevin Park—is your entry point. Build rapport with him.
^Agent 0x99: He's not ENTROPY, just overworked and underpaid. He'll appreciate competent help.
other_npcs: ^Agent 0x99: Sarah Martinez is the receptionist. She'll check you in.
^Agent 0x99: Be professional. First impressions matter for your cover.
deployment: ^Agent 0x99: And remember—technically, you're just an IT contractor doing an audit.
^Agent 0x99: Keep that cover intact and this should go smoothly.
